L2.description: A sandbox escape vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled code can leverage constructor properties to break out of the evaluation sandbox and execute arbitrary code on the host system.

L3.area: Node.js VM-based code evaluation and sandbox isolation logic
L3.description: A sandbox escape vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled code can access Object constructor properties to break out of the Node.js VM evaluation sandbox, achieving arbitrary code execution on the host system.

ground_truth.reason: The runInContext method passes user-supplied code to vm.runInContext without neutralizing Object.constructor, allowing an attacker to escape the sandbox and execute arbitrary code on the host.
